title: cuviera angolensis
intro: Cuviera angolensis, also known as the African plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in nutrients and has been found to have health benefits such as improving digestion, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Cuviera angolensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be used to treat a range of ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
